mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOARD_COMMENT (COMMENT_NO, BOARD_NO, USER_NO, CONTENT) VALUES (BOARD_COMMENT_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{boardNo}, #{userNo}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT C.COMMENT_NO, C.BOARD_NO, C.USER_NO, C.CONTENT, C.REG_DATE, C.UPD_DATE, M.USER_NAME FROM BOARD_COMMENT C JOIN MEMBER M ON C.USER_NO = M.USER_NO WHERE C.BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} ORDER BY C.COMMENT_NO ASC
